message:
fix(node): NaN/Inf fail-open guards in prestage_engine and dgis_migration_gate

prestage_engine: NaN predicted_probability bypassed threshold check
(NaN < 0.5 is false), allowing corrupt candidates to be staged.
Added !is_finite() guard + 4 regression tests.

dgis_migration_gate: NaN cascade_risk_delta bypassed policy check
(NaN >= 0.12 is false), silently allowing risky migrations.
Added !is_finite() guard + 3 regression tests.

Closes: bd-3qqc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
